base_url.description: Cart.com store API base URL, e.g. https://{store_name}/api/v1. Required: legacy derives this from a store_name config value when base_url is unset, but that cross-key derivation has no engine mechanism today (see docs.md Known limits), so this bundle requires the fully-formed URL instead.

access_token.description: Cart.com API access token, sent as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <access_token>). Never logged.

page_size.description: Records per page (matches legacy's page_size query param and defaultPageSize).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
